# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  clusters:
    - name: admin_stats_sink
      type: STATIC
      connect_timeout: 1s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: admin_stats_sink
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: 127.0.0.1
                      port_value: 9901

layered_runtime:
  layers:
    - name: static_layer
      static_layer:
        envoy:
          reloadable_features: {}
